description_long: This is a black and green squeezable tube of lotion with a matte finish, featuring a stylized green graphic of a face and bold white text reading '#urbano RECICLA' on the front. The tube tapers smoothly from a wide, rounded green base to a narrow, sealed top, which is likely a screw-on cap. The front side displays branding and product information, while the back is plain black with no visible text or graphics. The tube appears to be made of flexible plastic, suitable for dispensing lotion by squeezing. The overall design is modern and urban, with a focus on bold, contrasting colors and minimalistic graphics. The object is compact and portable, ideal for personal care use in urban environments.
description: A black and green squeezable lotion tube with bold graphics and a screw-on cap, designed for urban personal care. The front features a stylized face and prominent branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green face graphic, white '#urbano RECICLA' text, and product details on a black background.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the tube's tapered profile and partial visibility of the face graphic, with minimal text.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain black surface with no graphics or text, and the green base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the '#urbano' text vertically and the green base, with no face graphic visible.
